---
name: optischedule-enterprise-cicd
description: Build, test, and container validation reporting
on:
  workflow_dispatch:
  push:
    branches: [ main ]

permissions:
  contents: read
  pull-requests: read
  issues: read
---

# 🚀 Enterprise CI/CD Intelligence Layer

## Scope
- Validate build readiness
- Summarize test coverage
- Analyze dependency risk
- Report release readiness

## Output
Governance-ready CI health report.
